id.description: Stable id (matches gallery[].authorId in artworks/artworks.json where applicable).

image.description: Filename in images/people/ (shared across roles; move person in JSON only).

link.description: Shared external URL (https://…). Used for all languages unless overridden in en.link or ru.link.

name.description:
Display name; may include HTML such as
